name: DS Electrical Installation SW Ltd
description: Every department, every channel, every system, every rule on one canvas. Sub-blueprints embedded inside parent frames: pipeline funnel, retention loop, lead-source pareto, tech architecture stack. Yellow rules split major phases. Drag to pan. Bottom-right zoom. Bottom-left minimap.

cards.title: Google Pack
cards.body: Local pack on "electrician + town". 11 area pages.

cards.body: 25+ service pages, 15+ blog posts, schema markup.

cards.body: wa.me direct from website · mobile-first share.

cards.body: Existing customer referrals · largest single source.

cards.body: Price you agree = price you pay.

cards.body: Insulation, RCD, loop, R1+R2 · annual cal.

cards.body: Every drill · no dust on furniture.

cards.body: Branded van always presentable on customer drives.

cards.title: Van stock min/max audit
cards.body: Min/max levels per van for top 50 SKUs · weekly check · prevents job delays from missing parts.
